en.summary: This lengthy hadith, narrated through Ibn Abbas, records the Prophet Muhammad (SAWW) enumerating the spiritual rewards for fasting each successive day of the month of Sha'ban, from the first day through all thirty days, with escalating benefits. The Prophet was prompted by Imam Ali (AS) who asked him to describe Sha'ban's virtues in detail. Historically, this teaching was given during a gathering where the companions were discussing the merits of Sha'ban, reflecting the early Muslim community's practice of seeking detailed knowledge about acts of worship and their rewards.

key_terms.شعبان: Sha'ban, the eighth month of the Islamic calendar, preceding Ramadan
key_terms.حملة العرش: Carriers of the Throne, the angels who bear God's Throne
key_terms.الصراط: The Bridge (Sirat), the bridge over Hell that all must cross on Judgment Day
key_terms.الحور العين: Houris, the companions of Paradise described in the Quran
key_terms.منكر ونكير: Munkar and Nakir, the two angels who question the dead in the grave

en.seo_question: What are the rewards for fasting each day of Sha'ban according to the Prophet Muhammad?

ur.summary: یہ طویل حدیث ابن عباس سے مروی ہے جس میں نبی اکرم نے شعبان کے ہر دن کے روزے کی فضیلت بیان فرمائی ہے، بڑھتے ہوئے اجر و ثواب کے ساتھ۔ یہ تعلیم حضرت علی علیہ السلام کی درخواست پر دی گئی۔

key_terms.شعبان: شعبان، اسلامی تقویم کا آٹھواں مہینہ
key_terms.الصراط: صراط، جہنم پر لگا ہوا پل
key_terms.منكر ونكير: قبر میں سوال کرنے والے فرشتے

ur.seo_question: ماہ شعبان کے روزے کی کیا فضیلت ہے؟

tr.summary: İbn Abbas'tan rivayet edilen bu uzun hadiste, Hz. Peygamber Şaban ayının her gününde oruç tutmanın manevi mükafatlarını sırasıyla anlatmıştır.
tr.seo_question: Şaban ayında oruç tutmanın faziletleri nelerdir?

fa.summary: این حدیث طولانی از ابن عباس نقل شده و پیامبر فضائل روزه هر روز شعبان را با پاداش‌های فزاینده بیان فرموده‌اند.

id.summary: Hadis panjang dari Ibnu Abbas yang merinci pahala spiritual berpuasa setiap hari Sya'ban dengan manfaat yang semakin meningkat.

bn.summary: ইবনে আব্বাস থেকে বর্ণিত এই দীর্ঘ হাদীসে নবী শাবান মাসের প্রতিটি দিনে রোযার আধ্যাত্মিক পুরস্কার ক্রমবর্ধমানভাবে বর্ণনা করেছেন।
bn.seo_question: শাবান মাসে রোযা রাখার ফযীলত কী?

es.summary: Este extenso hadiz narrado por Ibn Abbas registra las recompensas espirituales crecientes para ayunar cada día del mes de Sha'ban, del primero al trigésimo.

key_terms.منكر ونكير: Los dos ángeles que interrogan en la tumba

fr.summary: Ce long hadith rapporté par Ibn Abbas relate les récompenses spirituelles croissantes pour le jeûne de chaque jour du mois de Sha'ban.

key_terms.منكر ونكير: Les deux anges qui interrogent dans la tombe

key_terms.شعبان: Scha'ban, der achte Monat des islamischen Kalenders
key_terms.منكر ونكير: Die zwei Engel, die im Grab befragen

ru.summary: Этот длинный хадис от Ибн Аббаса содержит перечисление возрастающих духовных наград за пост каждого дня месяца Шаабан.

zh.summary: 这段长篇圣训通过伊本·阿巴斯传述，记录了先知逐日列举舍尔邦月斋戒的递增精神奖赏。

key_terms.شعبان: 舍尔邦，伊斯兰历第八个月
key_terms.منكر ونكير: 在坟墓中审问的两位天使

zh.seo_question: 舍尔邦月每日斋戒的奖赏是什么？

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا الشَّيْخُ الْجَلِيلُ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُوسَى ابْنِ بَابَوَيْهِ الْقُمِّيُّ (رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ)، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ الْمُعَاذِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْمَرْوَزِيُّ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ عَيَّاشٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَاصِمٍ الْوَاسِطِيُّ، قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنِي عَطَاءُ بْنُ السَّائِبِ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ (صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ)
isnad_matn.matn_ar: وَقَدْ تَذَاكَرَ أَصْحَابُهُ عِنْدَهُ فَضَائِلَ شَعْبَانَ، فَقَالَ: شَهْرٌ شَرِيفٌ وَهُوَ شَهْرِي وَحَمَلَةُ الْعَرْشِ تُعَظِّمُهُ وَتَعْرِفُ حَقَّهُ وَهُوَ شَهْرٌ تُزَادُ فِيهِ أَرْزَاقُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ... قَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ: هَذَا لِشَهْرِ شَعْبَانَ

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُوسَى ابْنِ بَابَوَيْهِ الْقُمِّيُّ
narrators.name_en: Abu Ja'far Muhammad ibn Ali ibn al-Husayn ibn Musa ibn Babawayh al-Qummi
narrators.known_identity: Shaykh al-Saduq (d. 381 AH), the author of al-Amali and Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih

narrators.name_ar: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ الْمُعَاذِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Muhammad ibn Ibrahim ibn Ahmad al-Mu'adhi
narrators.ambiguity_note: Identified based on his nisbah al-Mu'adhi and his position in al-Saduq's chain. Not widely documented outside this specific transmission.
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Ibrahim ibn Ahmad al-Mu'adhi, a transmitter in the chain of al-Saduq

narrators.ambiguity_note: Common name; multiple narrators share this name. Identification depends on the broader chain context.

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو الْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ
narrators.name_en: Abu al-Hasan Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Ali
narrators.ambiguity_note: Identified by his kunya Abu al-Hasan and full nasab. Multiple narrators share this name pattern; identification based on chain context.
narrators.known_identity: Abu al-Hasan Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Ali, a narrator in the Saduq chain

narrators.ambiguity_note: Identified by his nisbah al-Marwazi (from Marw/Merv). The specific individual is not widely documented outside this chain.
narrators.known_identity: Al-Hasan ibn Muhammad al-Marwazi, from Marw (Merv)

narrators.ambiguity_note: Refers to Muhammad al-Marwazi, the father of al-Hasan ibn Muhammad al-Marwazi.
Not widely documented; identification based on his position in this specific chain between al-Marwazi's father and Ali ibn Asim al-Wasiti.

narrators.known_identity: Ali ibn Asim al-Wasiti (d. 201 AH), a well-known narrator from Wasit
Ata' ibn al-Sa'ib (d. 136 AH), a well-known tabi'i narrator
Sa'id ibn Jubayr (d. 95 AH), a prominent tabi'i and student of Ibn Abbas
Abdullah ibn Abbas (d. 68 AH), cousin of the Prophet and renowned Quran commentator

key_phrases.phrase_en: May Allah bless him and his family

similar_content_hints.description: Hadiths about the virtues of fasting in the month of Rajab, which similarly enumerate rewards for each day of fasting with escalating spiritual benefits.
Narrations about the night of mid-Sha'ban (Laylat al-Bara'ah) and its special merits, including forgiveness of sins and divine decree.
Hadith about the merits of fasting in Ramadan with day-by-day rewards, paralleling the structure of this Sha'ban hadith.
